# Snapshot of the official MCP reference servers — the directory names under
# modelcontextprotocol/servers/src — that the CFG059 typosquat allowlist
# (rules/cfg059_data.go) was last curated against. The check-typosquat-allowlist
# workflow alerts when this upstream set changes (a server added or removed), so
# the allowlist can be reviewed. After reviewing, update both rules/cfg059_data.go
# and this snapshot. (Remote-host anchors in cfg059_data.go have no authoritative
# upstream feed and are maintained manually.)
everything
fetch
filesystem
git
memory
sequentialthinking
time
